\tzpentry{ID11409}{General Sn Hypersphere Hypervolume}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The n-sphere hypervolume carrier is the standard surface measure of S^n with radius R.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
V_{S^{n}}(R)=\frac{2\pi^{(n+1)/2}}{\Gamma((n+1)/2)}R^{n}
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{11f2c6e6-4bd4-5f52-817f-3b94577e442b}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11409-s4s5-mix}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
